ksa_text: Knowledge of privacy technologies and data protection tools, including encryption standards, anonymization and de-identification techniques, privacy-enhancing technologies, data minimization implementations, and monitoring tools for privacy compliance.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA SP-K-010 (Security and Privacy/Knowledge) scores 0.425 composite (highest: NICE at 0.425) and is edge_case for the Data Marketplace Manager role. Domain prior: edge. Core signal hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority is appropriate for manager-level Data Marketplace Manager.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with edge_case scope, NICE signal (0.425), and Security and Privacy handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support Security/Privacy competencies for Data Marketplace Manager?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Privacy and data security competencies appear in 25-60% of Data Marketplace Manager postings, especially in regulated industries (finance, healthcare, public sector).
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. Security content is policy/org-level, not data implementation. Not market-supported. Final decision: exclude.
